text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! Have you seen my beloved<n>
Josephine?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Rarely do I ever let her leave my side,<n>but it
seems she's managed to abscond<n>off somewhere...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Ah, I speak, of course, of my<n>beloved hand
mirror. Oh, how she cries<n>when she is on her own.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But she needn't fear for long, for I am on<n>my way!
Wait for me, Josephiiine!
